character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Observed a peculiar smell on the ship and commented on the presence of fever.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Led the ship and orchestrated a plan to address mutiny by allowing the crew ashore.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the cabin party involved in discussing the mutiny.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: Attempted to mediate tensions by offering advice and appearing cooperative.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: De facto leader of the mutinous crew and arranged the shore party.

character_dossiers.name: Hunter
character_dossiers.biography: One of the sure men taken into the cabin party's confidence.

character_dossiers.name: Joyce
character_dossiers.biography: One of the sure men taken into the cabin party's confidence.

character_dossiers.name: Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: One of the sure men taken into the cabin party's confidence.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Narrator who observed the events and took action to evade Silver.
